title: DHI Group, Inc. Acquires Point Solutions Group to Advance ClearanceJobs Mission of Providing a Total Recruitment Solution for Government Contracting Talent
summary: CENTENNIAL, Colo.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) today announced it has acquired Point Solutions Group, an engineering and technology professional services firm focusing on defense contracting and government staffing. The acquisition marks another significant milestone in advancing DHIs ClearanceJobs brand strategy offering a total solution in the government contracting space.
